attributes.service.name: support-agent
attributes.gen_ai.prompt: A1000型でE-42が発生した場合の一次対応は何ですか？
attributes.gen_ai.response.text: E-42 indicates cooling fan obstruction. Stop the A1000, inspect the fan guard, remove debris, then restart below 60C.

attributes.service.name: support-agent
attributes.gen_ai.prompt: E-42をいつエスカレーションしますか？
attributes.gen_ai.response.text: Escalate E-42 when it repeats twice within 24 hours or temperature remains above 60C after inspection.
